name: Evidence of cooperation between the Mossad and Mojtaba Pourmohsen
message: Mojtaba, Are you still under the illusion that the Stables Rectory Farm meeting in Halstead was private? Every word spoken there was recorded , in full, high-fidelity, multi-channel format. Has James, your Mossad handler, told you yet? Does he know that the March meeting was a staged intel trap? You may be surprised to learn:…
